workloads.name: buffer-upload 1KB
workloads.description: Single upload command used to align with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 1KB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides; Fawn uses deferred queue sync to avoid per-command wait inflation at tiny payload size while preserving per-upload timing normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: buffer-upload 64KB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 64KB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: buffer-upload 1MB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 1MB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: buffer-upload 4MB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 4MB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: buffer-upload 16MB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 16MB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.

workloads.name: workgroup-atomic 1024
workloads.description: Workgroup-atomic compute kernel with 1024 workgroups, 100 dispatches per step, matching Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf exactly.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Kernel matches Dawn GenWorkgroupWithAtomics (256 threads, 1 atomicStore + 256 atomicLoads per invocation). Both sides dispatch 100 times per step with direct timing (no side-specific divisor scaling).
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: workgroup-non-atomic 1024
workloads.description: Non-atomic workgroup compute kernel with 1024 workgroups, 100 dispatches per step, matching Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf non-atomic variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Kernel matches Dawn GenWorkgroupNoAtomics (256 threads, 1 store + 256 loads per invocation). Both sides dispatch 100 times per step with direct timing (no side-specific divisor scaling).
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: matrix-vector multiply 32768x2048 f32 (naive swizzle0)
workloads.description: Matrix-vector compute kernel aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf dimensions (Rows=32768, Cols=2048, F32/F32, Impl=Naive, Swizzle=0, 100 dispatches).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples matrix-vector contract aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf variant geometry and per-dispatch normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: matrix-vector multiply 32768x2048 f32 (naive swizzle1)
workloads.description: Matrix-vector compute kernel aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf dimensions (Rows=32768, Cols=2048, F32/F32, Impl=Naive, Swizzle=1, 100 dispatches).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples matrix-vector contract aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf variant geometry and per-dispatch normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: matrix-vector multiply 32768x2048 f32 (workgroupshared swizzle1)
workloads.description: Matrix-vector compute kernel aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf dimensions (Rows=32768, Cols=2048, F32/F32, Impl=WorkgroupShared, Swizzle=1, 100 dispatches).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples matrix-vector contract aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf variant geometry and per-dispatch normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: shader-compile pipeline stress
workloads.description: Shader robustness pipeline stress aligned with Dawn ShaderRobustnessPerf (MatMulFloatOneDimSharedArray, f32, 512x512x512).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched compute pipeline creation + dispatch shape against Dawn ShaderRobustnessPerf MatMulFloatOneDimSharedArray f32 variant, including 50-dispatch step normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: render draw throughput
workloads.description: Native render/draw throughput workload aligned to Dawn DrawCallPerf base variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Both sides execute DrawCallPerf-style draw-call throughput against a 64x64 render target with static pipeline and bind-group defaults.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: render draw state/bindings
workloads.description: Render-pass state and bind-group benchmark using explicit viewport/scissor/blend/stencil + dynamic bind offsets.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicBindGroup variant with per-draw normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: render redundant pipeline/bindings
workloads.description: Render workload that intentionally rebinds pipeline and bind groups every draw.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf RedundantPipeline_RedundantBindGroups variant with per-draw normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: render bundle dynamic bindings
workloads.description: Render-bundle workload with dynamic bind-group offsets.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicBindGroup_RenderBundle variant with per-draw normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: render bundle dynamic pipeline+bindings
workloads.description: Render-bundle workload with dynamic pipeline and dynamic bind-group updates.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicPipeline_DynamicBindGroup_RenderBundle variant with per-draw normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: draw indexed render proxy
workloads.description: Indexed draw-call throughput benchmark using command-provided index buffers.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only draw-indexed proxy. Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicVertexBuffer as the nearest proxy; not strict apples-to-apples.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional-only: Both sides report per-draw throughput units; Fawn issues indexed draws and Dawn uses the closest draw-call throughput proxy variant. Repeat=10 plus deferred queue sync reduces per-sample setup/sync overhead while preserving per-draw normalization.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn-side draw-indexed variant and command-shape normalization are contract-equivalent.

workloads.name: texture sampling/raster
workloads.description: Texture/raster workload combining texture-sampling compute with a native render_draw raster step.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn SubresourceTrackingPerf arrayLayer_16_mipLevel_3 with per-iteration normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: texture sampler/write/query/destroy contract
workloads.description: Texture API contract benchmark covering sampler creation, queue write texture, texture query assertions, and resource destroy lifecycle.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn SubresourceTrackingPerf arrayLayer_16_mipLevel_3 while Fawn runs explicit sampler/write/query/destroy + raster command stream.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: texture sampler/write/query/destroy contract (mip8)
workloads.description: Texture API contract benchmark aligned to SubresourceTrackingPerf mipLevel=8 variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn SubresourceTrackingPerf arrayLayer_16_mipLevel_8 with the same Fawn texture lifecycle command stream.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: async pipeline diagnostics contract
workloads.description: Async diagnostics benchmark covering async render pipeline creation, error scopes, and shader compilation info.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: command shape, Dawn filter mapping, and timing normalization are explicitly aligned for strict comparability.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: p1 capability introspection contract
workloads.description: Directional contract workload for adapter/device/instance capability introspection and free-members lifecycle checks.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only contract. Dawn filter mapping is diagnostic and excluded from strict apples-to-apples claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional-only: Apples-to-apples P1 capability contract: normalize as a per-command introspection sequence.

workloads.name: surface presentation contract
workloads.description: Directional surface lifecycle proxy benchmark covering create/release surface path on headless adapters.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only surface lifecycle proxy. This workload is not comparable for strict claim lanes because Dawn perf coverage does not expose a matching create/release-surface benchmark contract.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional proxy only: normalize per create/release operation pair.

workloads.name: copy buffer-to-texture contract
workloads.description: Directional copy contract covering buffer-to-texture transfer path.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only copy contract. This benchmark is intentionally non-claimable until a Dawn-side copy-API parity path is added.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional copy contract only: normalize per copy command sequence.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once a Dawn map exists for direct copy-path parity.

workloads.name: copy texture-to-buffer contract

workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional texture-to-buffer copy contract only: normalize per copy command sequence.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once a Dawn texture-to-buffer copy-path contract is established.

workloads.name: dispatch fallback contract
workloads.description: Directional dispatch benchmark exercising the builtin fallback dispatch command path.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only dispatch contract. This benchmark is intentionally non-claimable until a Dawn-side comparable dispatch-likelihood lane is added.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional dispatch contract only: normalize per fallback dispatch operation.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once a Dawn compute-dispatch parity contract is established.

workloads.name: copy protocol contract
workloads.description: Directional mixed protocol benchmark combining sampler, copy, barrier, diagnostics, and texture lifecycle checks.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only protocol contract. This benchmark is intentionally non-claimable while copy-path parity remains directional.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional mixed protocol contract only: normalize across one full mixed API sequence.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn benchmark coverage includes the same mixed protocol command sequence.

workloads.name: copy texture-to-texture contract
workloads.description: Directional copy contract covering texture-to-texture transfer path.

workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional texture-to-texture copy contract only: normalize per copy command sequence.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once a Dawn texture-to-texture copy-path contract is established.

workloads.name: dispatch grid contract
workloads.description: Directional dispatch contract exercising non-trivial 3D dispatch grid shapes through fallback dispatch command path.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only dispatch protocol contract. This benchmark is intentionally non-claimable until a Dawn compute-dispatch parity lane is added.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional dispatch grid contract only: normalize across both-dispatch-sequence workload steps.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once a Dawn multi-shape dispatch parity contract is established.

workloads.name: surface full presentation contract
workloads.description: Directional surface lifecycle contract covering capabilities/configure/acquire/present/unconfigure/release operations.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only surface contract. This benchmark expands surface coverage beyond create/release for protocol-level parity diagnostics.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional full-surface contract only: normalize per full presentation cycle.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn and platform surface-present parity is contractually mapped.

workloads.name: concurrent execution single-dispatch contract
workloads.description: Compute contract aligned to Dawn ConcurrentExecutionTest RunSingle with a single heavy compute dispatch.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: command shape and Dawn filter mapping both exercise one long-running compute dispatch per benchmark step.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: uniform buffer update (WriteBuffer partial single)
workloads.description: Uniform update + draw benchmark aligned to Dawn UniformBufferUpdatePerf WriteBuffer Partial SingleUniformBuffer variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: per-iteration upload+draw workflow and normalization aligned to Dawn UniformBufferUpdatePerf WriteBuffer/Partial/SingleUniformBuffer.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: zero-initialize workgroup memory (256)
workloads.description: Compute workload aligned to Dawn VulkanZeroInitializeWorkgroupMemoryExtensionTest workgroupSize=256 variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: workgroup-size and iteration structure aligned to Dawn VulkanZeroInitializeWorkgroupMemoryExtensionTest.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).
